subject: Statistics
title: The Pareto Distribution
description: A tiny lesson with a big payoff: The Pareto Distribution.

hook.text: Vilfredo Pareto noticed 80% of Italian land was owned by 20% of people. The pattern was stable.

buildup.text: The Pareto distribution describes extreme inequality. A small fraction holds most of the total.

discovery.text: Income, academic citations, app downloads, and insurance claims all follow Pareto distributions.

twist.text: The 80/20 ratio is just one case. In some markets, 1% of creators produce 90% of the content.

climax.text: Pareto explains why winner-take-all dynamics dominate economics, culture, and technology.

punchline.text: The few dominate the many. Pareto saw it first.

quiz.question: What does the Pareto distribution describe?
options: Extreme inequality where a small fraction holds most of the total
